MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description, or PAD for short, is a data set that is used by shareware authors to disseminate information to anyone interested in their software products. To find out more go to http://www.asp-shareware.org/pad

Program_Info.Program_OS_Support: Win2000,WinXP,Win7 x32,Win7 x64,Windows 8,Windows 10,WinServer,WinOther,Windows2000,Windows2003,Windows Server 2000,Windows Server 2003,Windows Server 2008,Windows Server 2008r2,Windows Server 2012,Windows Tablet PC Edition 2005,Windows Media Center Edition 2005,WinVista,Windows Vista Starter,Windows Vista Home Basic,Windows Vista Home Premium,Windows Vista Business,Windows Vista Enterprise,Windows Vista Ultimate,WinVista x64,Windows Vista Home Basic x64,Windows Vista Home Premium x64,Windows Vista Business x64,Windows Vista Enterprise x64,Windows Vista Ultimate x64

NewsFeed.NewsFeed_DESCRIPTION: This PAD extension allows you to add your RSS and Atom news feeds info into your PAD file. This info can be used by RSS feed submission software or by feed directories themselves.

Site.Site_DESCRIPTION: This PAD extension allows you to add your site info into your PAD file. This info can be used by site submission software or by web directories themselves.

Permissions.EULA:
LICENSE AGREEMENT FOR ETAR SOFTWARE
PLEASE READ THIS SOFTWARE LICENSE AGREEMENT CAREFULLY BEFORE DOWNLOADING OR USING THE SOFTWARE. BY DOWNLOADING, INSTALLING, OR USING THIS SOFTWARE, YOU ARE CONSENTING TO BE BOUND BY THIS AGREEMENT. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO ALL OF THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, DO NOT INSTALL OR USE THE SOFTWARE.
1.THE COPYRIGHTS IN THIS SOFTWARE AND ANY RELATED SOURCE CODE OR FILES DISTRIBUTED WITH THE SOFTWARE BELONG TO MAKARIEL INC. ALL RIGHTS ARE RESERVED. INSTALLATION OF THIS SOFTWARE IS LICENSED ONLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH THESE TERMS. 2.GRANT OF LICENSE MAKARIEL GRANTS YOU A NON-EXCLUSIVE LICENSE TO TEST THIS SOFTWARE IN 30-DAY TRIAL VERSION, AND ANY ASSOCIATED DOCUMENTATION, AS INDICATED HEREIN: A.YOU MAY INSTALL AND USE THE TRIAL VERSION FOR EVALUATION PURPOSE ONLY DURING 30 DAYS AFTER THE INSTALLATION B.YOU MAY NOT USE THE TRIAL VERSION AFTER THE EVALUATION PERIOD OF 30 DAYS C.YOU ARE HEREBY LICENSED TO MAKE AS MANY COPIES OF THE TRIAL VERSION AS YOU WISH AND DISTRIBUTE IT TO ANYONE PROVIDED THAT ALL FILES ARE INTACT. YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO SELL THE TRIAL VERSION. 3.USES AND RESTRICTIONS EXCEPT AS EXPRESSLY AUTHORIZED ABOVE, CUSTOMER SHALL NOT: COPY, IN WHOLE OR IN PART THIS SOFTWARE OR ANY OF ITS RELATED DOCUMENTATION; REPRODUCE, REVERSE ENGINEER, DECOMPILE, MODIFY, NOR TAMPER WITH THIS SOFTWARE OR ANY PORTION OF THE SOFTWARE; RENT, LEASE, DISTRIBUTE, SELL, OR CREATE DERIVATIVE WORKS OF THE SOFTWARE. 4.LIMITATION OF LIABILITY A.YOU EXPRESSLY UNDERSTAND AND AGREE THAT, TO THE EXTENT NOT PROHIBITED BY LAW, MAKARIEL INC. SHALL NOT BE LIABLE TO YOU FOR: PERSONAL INJURY, OR ANY INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, INDIRECT OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES WHATSOEVER, INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, LOSS OF DATA, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION OR ANY OTHER COMMERCIAL DAMAGES OR LOSSES, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OR INABILITY TO USE THE SOFTWARE, HOWEVER CAUSED, REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY AND EVEN IF MAKARIEL INC. HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES. B.THE DISTRIBUTION OF THIS SOFTWARE CONVEYS NO PROPRIETARY RIGHTS IN THIS SOFTWARE TO YOU. C BECAUSE COMPUTER SOFTWARE IS INHERENTLY COMPLEX AND MAY NOT BE COMPLETELY FREE OF ERRORS, IT IS YOUR RESPONSIBILITY TO VERIFY YOUR WORK AND TO MAKE BACKUP COPIES, AND MAKARIEL INC. WILL NOT BE RESPONSIBLE FOR YOUR FAILURE TO DO SO. D. THE SOFTWARE SHALL BE USED BY YOU AT YOUR OWN RISK. MAKARIEL INC. DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESSED OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED, IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. 5.DISCLAIMER OF WARANTIES THIS SOFTWARE, AND ALL ACCOMPANYING FILES, DATA AND MATERIALS, ARE DISTRIBUTED "AS IS" AND WITH NO WARANTEES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESSED OR IMPLIED EXCEPT AS REQUIRED BY LAW. IF YOU INTEND TO RELY ON THIS SOFTWARE FOR CRITICAL PURPOSES YOU MUST TEST IT FULLY PRIOR TO USING IT, INSTALL REDUNDANT SYSTEMS AND ASSUME ANY RISK. 6.TERMINATION
THIS LICENSE IS EFFECTIVE UNTIL TERMINATED BY EITHER YOU OR MAKARIEL INC.. CUSTOMER MAY TERMINATE THIS LICENSE AT ANY TIME BY DESTROYING ALL COPIES OF SOFTWARE INCLUDING ANY DOCUMENTATION. THIS LICENSE WILL TERMINATE IMMEDIATELY WITHOUT NOTICE FROM MAKARIEL INC. IF CUSTOMER FAILS TO COMPLY WITH ANY PROVISION OF THIS LICENSE. UPON TERMINATION, CUSTOMER MUST DESTROY ALL COPIES, FULL OR PARTIAL, OF THIS SOFTWARE.
IF YOU UNDERSTAND AND AGREE TO THE ABOVE, ACCEPT THE AGREEMENT TO CONTINUE WITH THE INSTALLATION.

English.Keywords: free, accounting software, small business, free software, application, invoice, order, transaction, sales, entries, app, customer, supplier, receipt, cash application, profit, balance sheet, amount, finance, statement, report, analysis, accounts
English.Char_Desc_45: Free Accounting Software for Small Business
English.Char_Desc_80: Free accounting software package, Order Management and Invoicing
English.Char_Desc_250: ETAR is a free double accounting software package loaded with lots of powerful tools that help managers and accountants of a small to a medium size business to handle their daily accounting and sales activities.
English.Char_Desc_450: Free comprehensive accounting software designed with powerful tools that can help small businesses streamline their daily accounting transactions, process sales orders and invoices and export them to templates, apply receipts to invoices and keep track of collection and invoicing
English.Char_Desc_2000:
ETAR is a free accounting software package designed to allow any type of users, whether with an accounting knowledge or not, to efficiently enter and process accounting transactions. ETAR also includes a sales module that allows users to create sales order, sales invoices, receipts and cash application as well as a complete order status traceability. ETAR will allow the user to produce customizable account and customer statements.
Furthermore, ETAR includes wide variety of financial reports and analysis that enable managers to understand their business and make the right decisions.
